message:
feat: include user prompts in commit messages

Commit messages now include recent user prompts before the transcript link:

```
feat: add auth

Prompts:
• "Add login form with email/password"
• "Fix the TypeScript error"

🔮 View transcript: https://vibeinsights.dev/s/abc123
```

- Parse JSONL transcript for type=user messages
- Track last-seen prompt ID in /tmp/vibeinsights-lastcommit-{session}.txt
- Limit to 5 most recent prompts, truncate to 60 chars
- Add tests for prompt formatting
